nodes.context: Mickey Cohen was boss of this Los Angeles-based crime family during the mid-20th century.
Cohen worked as an enforcer for the Chicago Outfit during Prohibition and briefly met Al Capone.
Bugsy Siegel was a sitting boss of this syndicate; Cohen worked under Siegel in Los Angeles.
Jewish paramilitary group in Mandatory Palestine; Cohen raised funds and sent a man to teach explosives.

edges.context: Cohen worked as an enforcer for the Chicago Outfit during Prohibition.
Cohen worked under Bugsy Siegel, a boss of the National Crime Syndicate, in Los Angeles.
Cohen raised funds for Irgun and sent a man to teach explosives use.
